steps.description: Open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code by pressing **Ctrl+Shift+P** from the main workspace interface.
Type 'documentation' into the Visual Studio Code Command Palette input at the top of the interface.
Click the "Help: Documentation" option in the command palette dropdown of Visual Studio Code, immediately below the search bar after typing ">documentation".
@assertion "Teams apps are custom solutions designed to enhance collaboration and productivity within Microsoft Teams." exists
Click the "What capabilities can you build in Teams?" link in the "Apps in Teams" article on the Microsoft Teams documentation page.
@assertion "Teams platform supports the following app types" exists
Click the browser "New tab" button (plus icon) at the top-left corner of the Google Chrome window to open a new tab.
Activate the "Find" search bar in Google Chrome while viewing the "Apps in Teams" documentation page on the Microsoft Teams platform.

parameters.text: Build apps for Teams platform and cross-hub agent scenarios

steps.description: Type the text "Build apps for Teams platform and cross-hub agent scenarios" into the "Find by title" search box on the Microsoft Teams documentation page in Google Chrome.
@assertion the image displays normally.
Press **Ctrl+F** to activate the in-page search bar in the Chrome browser while viewing the “Apps in Teams” documentation page on the Microsoft Learn website.
Select all text in the search bar labeled "Find by title" within the Microsoft Edge browser displaying the Microsoft Teams documentation page.

parameters.text: get started with building agents in teams

steps.description: Type the text "get started with building agents in teams" into the search input box labeled "Find by title" on the Microsoft Teams platform documentation webpage in the left sidebar navigation panel.
Click the "Get started with Building agents in Teams" orange button link on the Microsoft Teams documentation webpage to begin the setup process.
@assertion "With the introduction of Teams SDK, developers can create collaborative agents for Teams users." exists
Click the browser's back button (red left-facing arrow) in the top-left corner of the Google Chrome window to navigate to the previous page in the Microsoft Learn “Agents in Teams” documentation.

Use the keyboard shortcut **Ctrl+F** in the Google Chrome browser (Windows) while viewing the Microsoft Learn website's "Apps in Teams" article to open the browser's page search/find bar and locate text within the documentation page.

parameters.text: Build a Teams message extension app

steps.description: Type the text "Build a Teams message extension app" into the "Find by title" search box on the left sidebar of the Microsoft Teams documentation page within a Google Chrome browser window.

Click the "Build a Teams message extension app" link in the "Build your first Teams app" section of the Microsoft Teams Platform documentation webpage. The link is highlighted, confirming the selection within the guide's main content area.
@assertion "A message extension allows users to interact with your web service" exists
